question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Millau will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2025-03-02?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance_TEMPERATURE_celsius.07558.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-03-02 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-02-20) was 5.763. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Millau.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - MILLAU - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance_TEMPERATURE_celsius.07558.D.
